https://www.google.com.hk/amp/hd.stheadline.com/amp/news/realtime/hk/1732002

立法會九月換屆大選。民主派劍指立會過半，期望做到「35+」，並先後在九西、九東舉行初步相關協調。公民黨昨日召開記者招待會，黨主席梁家傑表明會尊重初選，「我哋係完全義無反顧支持協調」，強調該黨會尊重初選結果，如若參選人排名太低不在協調名單之內，「一定唔會去選」。公民黨黨魁楊岳橋則進言，一旦民主派議席過半，特首林鄭月娥必須要在十月的《施政報告》中回應五大訴求，否則公民黨「唔會客氣」，否決所有撥款申請及法案，包括《施政報告》、《財政預算案》，做法與「本土派」的癱瘓路線異曲同工。


公民黨倡立會過半即「攬炒」

好想加入了

One of our colleagues on the 5/F at our Festival Walk office was tested positive yesterday for COVID-19. First and foremost, ou r thoughts are with our colleague, who is now receiving treatment at hospital, and we wish for a speedy and full recovery.

We have notified all our staff members who were in direct contact with the individual in the past 14 days and they have been advised to closely monitor their health status and to inform those with whom they were in direct contact. The individual did not have business meetings with external parties during this period.

Deep cleaning

Over the last weekend, we conducted professional deep cleaning and applied Sani-Mist Germicidal Treatment to all our office floors. With caution in mind with this confirmed case, we will close our office on 29, 30 and 31 March (Sunday, Monday and Tuesday) for a further round of deep cleaning and thorough disinfection at all floors.

Festival Walk Management Office has been informed of the confirmed case, and deep cleaning of common space in the office building will be carried out by the Management Office accordingly.

Work from home

All our staff members in the Festival Walk office should work from home until 9 April. During this period, please avoid face-to-face business meetings, and social gatherings of any size are strongly discouraged.

The Festival Walk office will remain open from 1 to 9 April (9:30am-4:30pm) to accommodate critical business activities that cannot be accomplished remotely. If you do need to come to the office for essential tasks, please seek approvals from your Group Leader in advance. Staff will be required to log in and log out of the office during this period of time, and our Facilities Management staff will be on site to provide the necessary assistance. Your Group Leader will be in contact with you on work arrangements in the coming two weeks. You are reminded to practise good personal hygiene and maintain social distancing to best protect yourself, and others during your stay in the office.

The Festival Walk office will be closed from 10 to 13 April during the Easter holiday, and will resume normal operation from Tuesday 14 April. You will be notified in advance should there be any changes to this arrangement.

The reshuffling of seating plan will be deferred in the interim.
